prompt: Using the reference image as the base, keep the rolled parchment scroll COMPLETELY IDENTICAL: the same warm yellow-beige rolled paper, same brown leather strap wrapping around the middle, same copper/bronze metallic buckle, same 3D tilted diagonal angle, same soft cartoon rendering style, same composition, same lighting direction, same transparent background. ONLY CHANGE: add bold uppercase text 'EXP' prominently embossed ON THE FRONT SURFACE of the brown LEATHER STRAP (centered on the strap's visible face, wrapping slightly with the strap's curvature). The 'EXP' text must be: large and highly visible, bright warm gold or cream-white color with strong dark outline and subtle drop shadow for maximum contrast against the brown leather, bold chunky sans-serif game-style letterform (thick strokes, slightly condensed, slight 3D extrusion/bevel effect as if embossed or branded into the leather), positioned on the front main panel of the belt NOT on the buckle, occupying about 40-50% of the strap's visible surface so it reads clearly even at small sizes. Do NOT modify the scroll paper, do NOT modify the buckle, do NOT change the color or shape of the strap itself, only ADD the text on top. Fully transparent PNG background, ONE SINGLE scroll icon, centered composition matching the reference exactly, polished 3D stylized game UI icon quality.
